title: ThreadlineContext
description: Open schema for AI agent user context. Seven typed scopes covering all meaningful dimensions of persistent user context.

preferences.description: Working style, tool preferences, format preferences, behavioural instructions.

goals.description: Active projects, current objectives, what the user is working toward.
examples: Launching a SaaS product targeting developers

knowledge.description: Technical stack, domain expertise, skills, professional background.

history.description: What happened in past sessions — decisions made, progress, completed tasks.

relationships.description: People the user mentions — team members, clients, collaborators, their roles.

communication_style.description: How the user likes to be spoken to — tone, verbosity, structure.

general.description: Core identity and context that doesn't fit other scopes.
